A player in a blue cap jumps vertically out of the water with both arms raised.
A yellow ball is in mid-air to the right of the players.
Spectators are standing on the pool deck behind the players.
The depth marker on the pool wall reads '6FT 9IN'.

spatial: The player with the number 13 cap is in the foreground, to the right of the player in the red cap. The player jumping out of the water is in the center, between the player in the red cap and the yellow ball. The goal net is to the left of all the players. The spectators are in the background, above the players in the water.

visible_entities.desc: swimmer with dark hair, wearing a dark blue swim cap with white text
swimmer wearing a blue swim cap
swimmer wearing a dark blue swim cap
swimmer wearing a white swim cap
legs of people standing on the pool deck
orange traffic cone
red and yellow lane ropes
white text 'GET-OUT' on the pool wall

atomic_facts.fact: Swimmers are creating large splashes in the pool water.
A swimmer in the foreground is moving away from the camera.
A swimmer in the mid-ground is surfacing with their mouth open.
The text 'GET-OUT' is visible on the pool wall above the water line.
Red and yellow lane ropes separate the swimming lanes.

spatial: The swimmers are in the water, below the pool deck where people are standing. The orange cone is on the pool deck, to the left of the 'GET-OUT' text. The red lane rope is to the left of the yellow lane rope in the background. The swimmer in the foreground is in front of the other swimmers.

visible_entities.desc: group of men wearing blue swim briefs, blue swim caps, and white face paint
visible_entities.action: standing in a line, cheering, and raising arms

man wearing a light blue t-shirt and dark shorts
man wearing a light blue t-shirt and dark shorts

atomic_facts.fact: A group of men in blue swim briefs and caps are standing together under a tent.
The men are raising their arms and cheering.
The text 'WAVES' is visible on the canopy tent.
A man on the right is holding two yellow balls.
An orange cone sits on the ground in front of the group.

spatial: The group of swimmers is positioned under the green canopy tent. The orange cone is on the ground in front of the swimmers. A man holding yellow balls is to the right of the main group of swimmers.
